prompt:
Goal: Create a whimsical vertical collage poster showing a young adult man surrounded by cute tiny chibi versions of himself in everyday life moments, like a motivational self-care memory board. The overall message is gentle, hopeful, and cozy: small responsibilities, dreams, family, rest, and perseverance.

Canvas: Portrait 4:5 illustration, dense magical composition, no hard panel borders, all scenes blended together with glowing plants, bokeh lights, sparkles, warm sunbeams, and deep blue-green foliage. Use a cinematic anime / storybook digital painting style with glossy black hair, soft skin tones, oversized cute proportions, warm golden highlights, and dreamy depth of field.

Main subject: In the center, place a larger bust portrait of a young adult man with shiny black hair, wearing a blue overshirt over a white T-shirt, holding a white mug labeled with exactly three bullet points: “Focus”, “Plan”, “Execute”. Keep the face area simple and featureless/blank, as if left ready for personalization, while the hair, ears, neck, clothes, and hand are fully illustrated.

Character count and scene list: Include exactly 13 depictions of the same person total: 1 large central adult portrait plus 12 cute tiny chibi scenes around him. The 12 chibi scenes are: 1) top left, brushing teeth at a small sink in a bright leafy bathroom corner; 2) top center, drinking chai near a window with the handwritten note “chai and hope”; 3) top right, standing near a “BUS STOP” sign with a backpack and a bus arriving behind him, with the note “Don’t stop until you’re proud”; 4) middle left, working at a laptop on a desk with the note “Work. Learn. Grow.”; 5) middle right, doing paperwork with calculator and bills, beside a checklist titled “Bills” containing “Rent”, “Electricity”, “Internet”, “EMI”, plus a sticky note “Pay on time”; 6) lower left, carrying groceries and a small lunchbox with the note “family first”; 7) lower-left center, writing in an open notebook next to a “GOALS” checklist with exactly five items: “Health”, “Financial Freedom”, “Travel”, “Help Others”, “Happiness”; 8) lower center, tangled in many charging cables while holding a phone, looking overwhelmed but cute; 9) lower right, sleepy on a green armchair wearing glasses, with the note “tired but trying”; 10) right lower-middle, sitting cross-legged with a warm drink, with the note “peace in small things”; 11) bottom left, looking over a balcony at a moonlit city skyline, with the note “small dreams, big heart”; 12) bottom right, sitting on a cozy couch with a small plush toy and the note “home is the destination”.

Text and handwritten notes: Use casual handwritten black lettering on cream paper notes or directly in the glowing background. Also include the note “New day, new start” near the top left with a small sun doodle. Add tiny hearts near several notes. Keep all text legible and spelled exactly as specified.

Visual details: The chibi figures should have rounded heads, glossy side-parted hair, small bodies, blue casual clothing, cute hands, and featureless/blank face areas for personalization. Surround everything with potted plants, vines, fairy lights, floating dust motes, star-like sparkles, cups, papers, books, lamps, and cozy home objects. Use a rich palette of teal, navy, emerald, warm amber, cream, and golden sunlight.

Constraints: Do not add extra characters beyond the 13 specified depictions. Do not add extra checklist items. Avoid photorealism, harsh outlines, horror, cluttered unreadable text, logos except the simple laptop silhouette, and watermarks.
